title: Cosmos Diary-Card — data-driven AI diary app (Credential + Circuit Map), React/Vite/Tailwind, white-label
title_vi: Cosmos Diary-Card — app nhat ky AI data-driven (Credential + Circuit Map), React/Vite/Tailwind, white-label
summary: Data-driven AI diary-card app (React 19 / Vite 6 / Tailwind v4). One Diary object renders Identity / Timeline / Plan / Graph facets, with a white-label profile swap (Ra <-> Anubis). Ra's two custom facets: holographic Credential (IdentityCard) + 2D Circuit Map (GraphMap). Bundles the GeminiStudio-build security-audit + subpath-deploy recipe.
usage_notes: Rebuild: npm install && npm run build (vite base './'). Deploy: cp -r dist/. web-templates/apps/diary-card/. Source kept at apps/diary-card/_src/. Live (after PR #23 merge): https://alexlamph.github.io/cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/apps/diary-card/ . Design patterns carded separately: Circuit Map = AK-CDP-00000CP; Credential = diary-concepts/credential-full. White-label proven via the Ra/Anubis profile swapper.
summary_vi: App nhat ky-the AI: 1 object Diary do ra 4 mat (Identity/Timeline/Plan/Graph) + doi ho so white-label (Ra<->Anubis). Hai mat cua Ra: the Credential hologram (vien neon @property --cred-ang, foil xoay mau, chip vang, MRZ; bo 3D tilt) + Circuit Map 2D canvas (chip Ra giua, pad noi mach PCB goc vuong, pulse chay, hover sang trace, click ghim HUD). Kem cong thuc audit bao mat build GeminiStudio + deploy subpath. Repo: web-templates/apps/diary-card/ (build + _src). Cross-ref Circuit Map AK-CDP-00000CP. Live sau merge PR #23.
